name: Kletskopjes (Chatter Boxes)
recipeInstructions: Combine all ingredients in a mixing bowl and mix well. Form into small marble-sized balls. Place on ungreased cookie sheets about 2 1/2 inches apart. Bake on the lower rack of the oven at 400°F for 5 minutes or until the dough flattens out. Cool, then remove with a spatula. Do not overbake.
